basic_details.job_title: HNBGU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNBGU) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Assistant. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 23-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HNBGU official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Physics from a recognised University or Equivalent

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 27000/- per month plus HRA as per institute norm

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HNBGU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
